generator: hand-edited; do not regenerate (this IS the source of truth)

cards.name: Freeze
cards.shortDesc: Freeze an opponent's piece for 1 turn.
cards.rulesText: Choose one of your opponent's pieces (not the king). That piece cannot move on the opponent's next turn. Frozen pieces can still be captured. The freeze expires at the end of their next turn.

cards.name: Shield
cards.shortDesc: Protect a piece from capture for 1 turn.
cards.rulesText: Choose one of your pieces. That piece cannot be captured during the opponent's next turn. The shield expires automatically at the end of that turn.

cards.name: Foul Ground
cards.shortDesc: Your opponent cannot move to the chosen square next turn.
cards.rulesText: Choose any empty square. Your opponent cannot move any piece to that square on their next turn. The foul expires at the end of their turn.

cards.name: Double Step
cards.shortDesc: Move any pawn exactly 2 squares forward. Uses your whole turn.
cards.rulesText: Move one of your pawns exactly two squares forward, regardless of its current position. The destination square must be empty and both intervening and destination squares clear. Sets the en passant square correctly. Cannot capture with this card. This is your entire move for the turn.

cards.name: Pawn Retreat
cards.shortDesc: Move one of your pawns 1 square backward (straight or diagonal). Uses your whole turn.
cards.rulesText: Choose one of your pawns. Move it one square backward (straight or diagonal) toward your home rank. The destination must be empty. Cannot capture. Cannot leave your king in check. This is your entire move for the turn.

cards.name: Sidestep
cards.shortDesc: Move one of your pawns 1 square diagonally forward (no capture). Uses your whole turn.
cards.rulesText: Choose one of your pawns. Move it one square diagonally forward to an empty square. Cannot capture. Cannot leave your king in check. (Forward = toward the opponent's home rank.) This is your entire move for the turn.

cards.name: Knight's Path
cards.shortDesc: Any piece moves like a knight this turn.
cards.rulesText: Before your move, nominate one of your pieces. That piece moves as if it were a knight for this turn only. The piece must still not leave your king in check. This does not count as moving the piece for castling purposes.

cards.name: Extra Move
cards.shortDesc: Take an additional chess move this turn.
cards.rulesText: After making your normal chess move, you may make one additional chess move. The second move cannot be a capture. Cards cannot be played during the second move.

cards.name: Coup
cards.shortDesc: Remove any reachable opponent piece from the board.
cards.rulesText: Remove any one of your opponent's pieces (not the king) that is currently reachable by at least one of your pieces. The removed piece counts as captured. This uses your card play for this turn.

cards.name: Resurrection
cards.shortDesc: Return your most recently captured minor piece to the board.
cards.rulesText: Place your most recently captured non-pawn, non-king piece (N, B, or R) on any empty square in your back two ranks. If you have no eligible captured pieces, this card has no effect and is discarded.

cards.name: Teleport
cards.shortDesc: Move one of your pieces to any empty square.
cards.rulesText: Move any one of your pieces to any empty square on the board. This move cannot leave your king in check. The piece does not capture, and this is not a normal chess move.

cards.name: Pawn Storm
cards.shortDesc: Advance all your pawns 1 square. (Entire turn.)
cards.rulesText: This is your entire move for the turn. Advance every one of your pawns forward one square, but only those that can legally move (not blocked). Pawns that would promote do so automatically (promoting to queen). This cannot leave your king in check.

cards.name: Promotion Rush
cards.shortDesc: Rush one pawn to the promotion rank.
cards.rulesText: Move one of your pawns to the square immediately before its promotion rank (rank 7 for white, rank 2 for black). If the pawn is already there, this card is wasted. The destination square must be empty.

cards.name: Ghost Step
cards.shortDesc: One piece phases through all blocking pieces this turn.
cards.rulesText: Choose one of your pieces. On your next chess move, that piece may pass through all blocking pieces as if they weren't there. It cannot land on a friendly piece or leave your king in check.

cards.name: Swap
cards.shortDesc: Swap the positions of any two of your own pieces.
cards.rulesText: Swap the board positions of any two of your pieces. Neither resulting position may leave your king in check. Shields and frozen states follow the pieces to their new squares.

cards.name: Fortify
cards.shortDesc: One pawn moves like a rook this turn.
cards.rulesText: Choose one of your pawns. On your next chess move, that pawn may move as if it were a rook. The move must still be legal and not leave your king in check. This expires after your move.

cards.name: Retreat
cards.shortDesc: Move one of your pieces backward up to 2 squares.
cards.rulesText: Move any one of your pieces backward up to 2 squares along its normal movement axes. Pawns may retreat with this card (backward, toward your home rank). Cannot capture. Cannot leave king in check.

cards.name: Disrupt
cards.shortDesc: Force your opponent to move a specific piece type.
cards.rulesText: Name a piece type (pawn, knight, bishop, rook, or queen). Your opponent must move a piece of that type on their next turn, if they have a legal move with one. If they have no legal move with that piece type, this card has no effect.

cards.name: Mirror
cards.shortDesc: Copy your opponent's last move with one of your own pieces. (Entire turn.)
cards.rulesText: Replay your opponent's last chess move using one of your pieces of the same type. If the exact destination is occupied, find the nearest legal alternative. If no mirroring is possible, the card is wasted and discarded. This is your entire move for the turn.

cards.name: Trade
cards.shortDesc: Swap your weakest pawn with your opponent's weakest pawn.
cards.rulesText: Swap the position of your most-advanced pawn with your opponent's least-advanced pawn. If either side has no pawns, this card cannot be played. The swap cannot leave either king in check.

cards.name: Fog
cards.shortDesc: Your opponent must pre-declare their move before you move.
cards.rulesText: Your opponent must declare their intended next move before you make yours. In simulation mode this is a flavor effect only. The fog expires after their turn.

cards.name: Time Warp
cards.shortDesc: Undo the last 2 plies (your last move + opponent's response).
cards.rulesText: Restore the board to the state before your last chess move and your opponent's response. You must then play a different chess move. This card returns to your hand after use. Can only be used once per game per player.
